_comment: Tests listed here are known to diverge from Linux. They still run and are reported as XFAIL, but do not fail the suite. Remove entries as implementations are completed.
process.wait4_wnohang: Child PID=2 on Kevlar vs high PID on Linux; PID values are non-deterministic (test artifact).
time.clock_realtime: Wall-clock tv_sec differs by 1s due to sequential test execution timing (test artifact).
events.poll_basic: 30s timeout — poll on pipe fds blocks indefinitely (POLL_WAIT_QUEUE wakeup issue with pipes).
events.inotify_create_xfail: 30s timeout — inotify_init1 returns a stub fd but IN_CREATE watch never fires.
